title: SME skills horizon 2025
body: "The skills horizon report provides a snapshot of the recruitment and skills landscape for the year ahead.  Now in its third year, this report brings together year-on-year data from 1,500 SME decision makers across England.  It includes data and analysis of:   SMEs’ top 5 concerns for the year ahead average expected growth in revenue for 2025 by sector percentage of SMEs planning to invest in upskilling existing workforce by sector the top skills that would stand out to an SME recruiting in 2025 predictions for the year ahead   The report is linked to the government’s Skills for Life communications campaign.  More information about skills options for employers is available on the Skills for Careers website.  The SME Skills Horizon 2024 report is available on the National Archives.  "
